title: Der Nachsommer
summaries: "Der Nachsommer" by Adalbert Stifter is a novel published in the 19th century. This three-volume Bildungsroman follows Heinrich, a sheltered young man who journeys from childhood to maturity. After a regimented upbringing, Heinrich becomes a natural scientist exploring the Alps. A chance encounter with a mysterious mentor at the enchanting Rosenhaus estate transforms his understanding of life. Through art, nature, and carefully ordered beauty, Heinrich gradually absorbs traditional values and discovers what it means to become a complete human being.
